message:
Fix ptReset missing unicode state reset and doc_find_field escape flag mask

Two bugs found during deep review:

1. ptReset() (EventParser JSONL reset) did not clear ptUnicodeRemaining,
   ptUnicodeAccum, ptHighSurrogate, ptUtf8Remaining, ptUtf8Accum, ptUtf8Ctx.
   If a JSONL boundary fell inside a unicode escape, stale state would corrupt
   the next value's parse. spReset() (createParser) already had this correct.

2. doc_find_field() compared raw w.data.len (which includes escape flag in
   bit 23) against key_len without masking. Keys containing backslash escapes
   would always fail the fast-path length check. Fixed with & 0x7FFFFF mask,
   consistent with doc_read_string_raw().

Adds 2 tests: escaped key property access, JSONL resetForNext iteration.
